raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/XXXX An online purchase of {$4200.00} was made for a XXXX from XXXX with a My Best Buy Visa Platinum card # XXXX and possibly XXXX was involved XXXX. I never have seen or opened acct for. I later received letter of notification from Best Buy Credit Services about the purchase and desire for collection. I do not see this card on my XXXX credit card report of current cards used or closed. Another letter with all documents from purchase from Best Buy Credit Services was received XX/XX/XXXX after I disputed charges and called to notify it was an acct not opened by me. I put a freeze on my credit and contacted all credit bureaus, when loggin into XXXX I noticed an email confirmation which was one used in this purchase XXXX, not my email... they hacked all my info and opened this card obviously. On my experian profile of residence there is now a New York address, I have never been to New York!!! Now Best Buy Credit services tell me in letter this purchase was confirmed and authorized and I owe!! I disputed this twice and did not work. The IP address they were made, name and address are not me. Please help
